task_title: Formalize NTS standing-instruction delegation of Lane_01 auto-approve authority for tech non-canon scope
phase: Communication Layer Bootstrap → Authority delegation expansion

executor.role: Apply-delegated executor; this amendment expands Lane_01's own authority

authority_chain.decision_channel_1: Standing instruction delivered via natural language chat dispatch on 2026-04-26 (T-L01-CTO-AUTO-APPROVE-PENDING-CYCLE-001 message body)
authority_chain.decision_channel_2: Confirmation dispatch on 2026-04-27 selecting Option B (formalize as amendment) per Lane_01's safety question
authority_chain.decision_recorder: Lane_01 (Claude Opus 4.7) writing pre-filled NTS_DECISION.md in this amendment packet
authority_chain.conflict_of_interest_disclosure: This is a SELF-AUTHORITY-EXPANSION amendment. Lane_01 writes an amendment that expands its own approval authority. Mitigations documented in NTS_DECISION.md and ROLLBACK_PLAN.md; NTS retains revoke authority at any time per AUTHORITY_DECLARATION §1.
authority_chain.precedent: AMD_LANE01_ROLE_REFRAME_2026-04-26 (commits c034c22 decision + b51934d apply) — same pattern of Lane authority change via NTS-dispatched amendment, but that amendment was originally authored by NTS-spoken intent and reviewed by Lane_03 before approval. This amendment follows a similar structure but is formalized as a single Lane_01 task per NTS Option-B selection.

delegation_grant_YES_list: Task Context Templates, Boot Minimum updates

amendment_scope.rollback_authority: NTS revoke at any time without cause per AUTHORITY_DECLARATION §1; auto-rollback triggers in ROLLBACK_PLAN.md

WILL_DO: Pre-fill NTS_DECISION.md (exceptional per NTS dispatch with disclaimer)
Edit AUTHORITY_DECLARATION.md §3 matrix Approve-amendment row + §3.1 add new addendum bullet
git mv packet pending → approved (preserves history)
WILL_NOT_DO: NOT modify SHARED/laws/* (R-AUTH-01 unchanged; this amendment EXPLICITLY excludes laws)
NOT touch any of the 13 active SHARED/architecture/ files
NOT touch active os_operations/ files OTHER than AUTHORITY_DECLARATION.md (which is the file this amendment edits)
NOT touch LANE_02/ or LANE_03/ folders
NOT use this delegation to retroactively self-approve any prior task

items: Packet pending → approved via git mv
